form.formComment: Last start 4th over 2100m at Lisieux beaten 18m by Melitte De Riviere in 4yo fillies race on March 26 at $35. Two runs back 4th over 2350m at Angers beaten 15m by Milkshake in 4yo race on January 28 at $65. Likely to find this a bit tough.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run he won by 2.6m at Laval beating Monarque Du Trieux in 4yo colts and gelding race on February 4 at $4.40. Has the right credentials to take this out.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Resuming after four months off the scene. Finished off last campaign when beaten by 3.9m finishing second behind Madras at Saint Brieuc over 2575m in a 3yo race on December 5 at $2.20. Previous preparation first-up posted a big 49m win at Machecoul beating Mister De Subligny in 3yo handicap on October 19. Strong winning hope.

form.formComment: Last start 7th over 2850m at Laval, beaten 9.5m by Mephistons Didjeap in 4yo colts and gelding race on March 28 at $9.90. form.formComment: Last start 7th over 2100m at Lisieux, beaten 16m by Montana Kalouma in 4yo colts and gelding race on March 26 at $9.70. Two runs back 2nd over 2200m at Caen beaten 5.5m by Marc Aurele in 4yo colts and gelding race on March 2 at $75. Can't recommend against this lot.

form.formComment: Resumes today. Her previous first-up run was successful when she won by 15m at Ranes beating Manzana Era in 3yo fillies race on May 18. Will find this a tough assignment; prefer later.
